title: Taxi Zablaće | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Zablaće: fixed airport transfers to Split (€95) and Zadar for campers and beach guests near Amadria Park, plus runs to Šibenik and Vodice.
keywords: taxi zablace, zablace taxi, zablace campsite taxi, zablace airport transfer, amadria park zablace taxi, zablace to split airport

schema.name: Taxi Zablaće
schema.description: Private fixed-price taxi from Zablaće, the campsite and Amadria Park area southwest of Šibenik, to Split Airport, Zadar Airport, Šibenik and Vodice.

mainEntity.name: Do you pick up from the campsite and the Amadria Park area?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I collect you at the campsite reception, your apartment or the Amadria Park area nearby, with room for luggage and gear. Send the exact spot when you book.

mainEntity.name: Is there space for camping and beach gear?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Škoda Superb has a large boot for suitcases, camping equipment and beach kit. Tell me if you have bikes or bulky items so I can plan for it.

mainEntity.name: How much is Zablaće to Split Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed €95 per car for up to 4 passengers, tolls and luggage included, the same price in both directions.
